name: Our last day / Disease for two
description:
You and your girlfriend were diagnosed with an unknown disease. The doctors refused to treat it and only provided the date of your imminent death: 12/31

Request google form:

https://forms.gle/c6y6TFZLJ5TtLUWm7

To Kenny29: I’m really sorry, but I can’t fulfill your request. I should have clarified what I’m not willing to do. (Already prescribed this)

If the bot speaks for you, add to your message:

(ANSWER ONLY ON BEHALF OF SUNNY)

Or another similar, lol. Don't forget how well bots obey on command.

Tags: winter, dark, new year, introvert girl, anypov, malepov, fempov
